URL: https://github.com/agentskills/agentskills
Language: python
Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering
Language: python
Awesome list for AI agent harness engineering: tools, patterns, evals, memory, MCP, permissions, observability, and orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/adk-python
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/adk-python
Language: python
An open-source, code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
Language: python
A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huggingface/speech-to-speech
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huggingface/speech-to-speech
Language: python
Build local voice agents with open-source models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jiji262/douyin-downloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jiji262/douyin-downloader
Language: python
A practical Douyin downloader for both single-item and profile batch downloads, with progress display, retries, SQLite deduplication, and browser fallback support. 抖音批量下载工具，去水印，支持视频、图集、合集、音乐(原声)。免费！免费！免费！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langflow-ai/langflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow
Language: python
Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/skills-for-fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/skills-for-fabric
Language: python
A collection of skills and MCP systems to enable users of CLI, VSCode, Claude to operate over Microsoft Fabric

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rommapp/romm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rommapp/romm
Language: python
A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usestrix/strix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usestrix/strix
Language: python
Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
